en: They came to the other side of the sea, to the country of the Gerasenes.
zh: 他們到了海的那邊，進入格拉森人的地區。

en: And when Jesus had stepped out of the boat, immediately there met him out of the tombs a man with an unclean spirit.
zh: 耶穌一下船，就有一個被污靈附著的人，從墓地裡迎面而來。

en: He lived among the tombs. And no one could bind him anymore, not even with a chain,
zh: 那人經常住在墳墓中間，從來沒有人能綁住他，甚至用鎖鍊都不能。

en: for he had often been bound with shackles and chains, but he wrenched the chains apart, and he broke the shackles in pieces. No one had the strength to subdue him.
zh: 曾經有很多次，人用腳鐐和鎖鍊捆綁他，鎖鍊卻被他掙斷，腳鐐也被他弄碎，始終沒有人能制伏他。

en: Night and day among the tombs and on the mountains he was always crying out and bruising himself with stones.
zh: 他晝夜在墳墓裡和山野間喊叫，又用石頭砍自己。

en: And when he saw Jesus from afar, he ran and fell down before him.
zh: 他遠遠地看見耶穌，就跑過去拜他，

en: And crying out with a loud voice, he said, "What have you to do with me, Jesus, Son of the Most High God? I adjure you by God, do not torment me."
zh: 大聲呼叫，說：“至高 神的兒子耶穌，我跟你有甚麼關係呢？我指著 神懇求你，不要叫我受苦。”

en: For he was saying to him, "Come out of the man, you unclean spirit!"
zh: 因為當時耶穌吩咐他：“你這污靈，從這人身上出來！”

en: And Jesus asked him, "What is your name?" He replied, "My name is Legion, for we are many."
zh: 耶穌問他：“你叫甚麼名字？”他回答：“我名叫‘群’，因為我們眾多。”

en: And he begged him earnestly not to send them out of the country.
zh: 他再三央求耶穌，不要把他們從那地方趕走。

en: Now a great herd of pigs was feeding there on the hillside,
zh: 附近的山坡上有一大群豬正在吃東西；

en: and they begged him, saying, "Send us to the pigs; let us enter them."
zh: 污靈求耶穌說：“打發我們到豬群那裡附在豬身上吧。”

en: So he gave them permission. And the unclean spirits came out, and entered the pigs, and the herd, numbering about two thousand, rushed down the steep bank into the sea and were drowned in the sea.
zh: 耶穌准了他們。污靈就出來，進到豬群裡去，於是那群豬闖下山崖，掉在海裡淹死了，豬的數目約有兩千。

en: The herdsmen fled and told it in the city and in the country. And people came to see what it was that had happened.
zh: 放豬的人都逃跑了，到城裡和各鄉村去報告，大家就來看發生了甚麼事。

en: And they came to Jesus and saw the demon-possessed man, the one who had had the legion, sitting there, clothed and in his right mind, and they were afraid.
zh: 他們來到耶穌跟前，看見那被鬼附過的人，就是曾被名叫‘群’的鬼附過的人，坐在那裡，穿上了衣服，神志清醒，他們就害怕。

en: And those who had seen it described to them what had happened to the demon-possessed man and to the pigs.
zh: 看見的人把被鬼附過的人所遭遇的和那群豬的事，告訴了他們。

en: And they began to beg Jesus to depart from their region.
zh: 他們就要求耶穌離開他們的地區。

en: As he was getting into the boat, the man who had been possessed with demons begged him that he might be with him.
zh: 耶穌上船的時候，那被鬼附過的人來求他，要和他在一起。

en: And he did not permit him but said to him, "Go home to your friends and tell them how much the Lord has done for you, and how he has had mercy on you."
zh: 耶穌不許，卻對他說：“你回家到你的親屬那裡去，把主為你作了多麼大的事，並他怎樣憐憫你，都告訴他們。”

en: And he went away and began to proclaim in the Decapolis how much Jesus had done for him, and everyone marveled.
zh: 那人就走了，開始在低加波利傳講耶穌為他所作的大事，眾人都希奇。

en: And when Jesus had crossed again in the boat to the other side, a great crowd gathered about him, and he was beside the sea.
zh: 耶穌又坐船渡到那邊；還在海邊的時候，有一大群人向他圍攏過來。

en: Then came one of the rulers of the synagogue, Jairus by name, and seeing him, he fell at his feet
zh: 當時來了一位會堂的主管，名叫葉魯。他一看見耶穌，就俯伏在他腳前，

en: and implored him earnestly, saying, "My little daughter is at the point of death. Come and lay your hands on her, so that she may be made well and live."
zh: 迫切地求他說：“我的小女兒快要死了，請你來按手在她身上，把她救活。”

en: And he went with him. And a great crowd followed him and thronged about him.
zh: 耶穌就和他一起去了。 一大群人跟著他，擁擠著他。

en: And there was a woman who had had a discharge of blood for twelve years,
zh: 有一個女人，患了十二年的血漏病，

en: and who had suffered much under many physicians, and had spent all that she had, and was no better but rather grew worse.
zh: 在好些醫生手中受了許多痛苦，又花盡了她一切所有的，不僅毫無起色，反而更加沉重。

en: She had heard the reports about Jesus and came up behind him in the crowd and touched his garment.
zh: 她聽見耶穌的事，就從後面來雜在人群中間，摸耶穌的衣服。

en: For she said, "If I touch even his garments, I will be made well."
zh: 因為她說：“只要摸到他的衣服，我就必痊愈。”

en: And immediately the flow of blood dried up, and she felt in her body that she was healed of her disease.
zh: 於是她血漏的源頭立刻乾了，她在身體上感覺到病已經得了醫治。

en: And Jesus, perceiving in himself that power had gone out from him, immediately turned about in the crowd and said, "Who touched my garments?"
zh: 耶穌自己立刻覺得有能力從他裡面出去，就轉過身來對群眾說：“誰摸了我的衣服？”

en: And his disciples said to him, "You see the crowd pressing around you, and yet you say, 'Who touched me?'"
zh: 門徒對他說：“你看，這麼多人擁擠你，你還問‘誰摸我’嗎？”

en: And he looked around to see who had done it.
zh: 耶穌周圍觀看，要看作這事的女人。

en: But the woman, knowing what had happened to her, came in fear and trembling and fell down before him and told him the whole truth.
zh: 那女人知道在她身上所成就的事，就恐懼戰兢地前來向耶穌俯伏，把實情全告訴了他。

en: And he said to her, "Daughter, your faith has made you well; go in peace, and be healed of your disease."
zh: 耶穌對她說：“女兒，你的信使你痊愈了，平安地回去吧，你的病已經好了。”

en: While he was still speaking, there came from the ruler's house some who said, "Your daughter is dead. Why trouble the Teacher any further?"
zh: 耶穌還在說話的時候，有人從會堂主管的家裡來說：“你的女兒已經死了，何必還勞動老師呢？”

en: But overhearing what they said, Jesus said to the ruler of the synagogue, "Do not fear, only believe."
zh: 耶穌聽見所說的話，就對會堂主管說：“不要怕！只要信！”

en: And he allowed no one to follow him except Peter and James and John the brother of James.
zh: 於是他不許別人跟他一起去，只帶了彼得、雅各和雅各的弟弟約翰。

en: They came to the house of the ruler of the synagogue, and Jesus saw a commotion, people weeping and wailing loudly.
zh: 他們來到會堂主管的家，耶穌看見許多人哭泣哀號，一片混亂，

en: And when he had entered, he said to them, "Why are you making a commotion and weeping? The child is not dead but sleeping."
zh: 就走進去，對眾人說：“為甚麼大哭大嚷呢？孩子不是死了，是睡著了。”

en: And they laughed at him. But he put them all outside and took the child's father and mother and those who were with him and went in where the child was.
zh: 眾人就嘲笑他。耶穌把眾人都趕出去，帶著孩子的父母和跟隨他的門徒，進入孩子所在的房間。

en: Taking her by the hand he said to her, "Talitha cumi," which means, "Little girl, I say to you, arise."
zh: 耶穌拉著孩子的手，對她說：“大利大，古米！”翻譯出來就是：“小女孩，我吩咐你起來！”

en: And immediately the girl got up and began walking (for she was twelve years of age), and they were immediately overcome with amazement.
zh: 那女孩子就立刻起來行走；那時她已經十二歲了。眾人就非常驚奇。

en: And he strictly charged them that no one should know this, and told them to give her something to eat.
zh: 耶穌再三囑咐他們，不要讓人知道這事，又吩咐給她東西吃。
